# <Architecture document title>

## Purpose

Define the system, subsystem or concern covered by this document.

## Context

Describe actors, boundaries and relevant constraints.

## Components

Describe responsibilities and dependencies without duplicating implementation
details.

## Data and control flow

Include a Mermaid diagram when it materially improves understanding.

## Interfaces

Reference contracts, events and integration boundaries.

## Quality attributes

Cover security, privacy, reliability, performance and observability.

## Decisions

Link applicable ADRs rather than repeating their rationale.

## Current limitations

Separate confirmed limitations from planned improvements.

## Validation

State how the architecture is checked against the repository.
